content: Access via this link is no longer available since its lifetime has expired.

comment.text: This key displays a message within a dialog (likely an Edit Link Panel) informing the user that a shared link has expired and is no longer accessible. It appears when a link's lifetime has passed, explaining the reason for inaccessibility. Translators should ensure the wording clearly conveys the link's expiration.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: Grammatical error in the Czech sentence: 'přes toto odkazem' is incorrect. It should be 'přes tento odkaz' (through this link) or 'pomocí tohoto odkazu'. The current phrasing is ungrammatical and sounds unnatural.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Přístup přes tento odkaz již není k dispozici, protože jeho životnost vypršela.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Finnish translation contains a grammatical error in the verb phrase 'on vanhentunut' (has expired) used with the noun 'voimassaoloa' (validity/lifetime) in the partitive case, which makes the sentence sound unnatural or incorrect. More importantly, 'sen voimassaoloa on vanhentunut' is grammatically broken; it should be 'sen voimassaoloaika on päättynyt' or 'sen voimassaolo on päättynyt'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Tämän linkin kautta tapahtuva pääsy ei ole enää käytettävissä, koska sen voimassaoloaika on päättynyt.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The term 'ວົງຈອນຊີວິດ' (vong chon si vit) literally means 'life cycle' (biological/natural cycle), which sounds unnatural and awkward when referring to a digital link's expiration. It should use a term for 'validity period' or 'expiration period'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: ການເຂົ້າເຖິງຜ່ານລິ້ງນີ້ບໍ່ສາມາດໃຊ້ໄດ້ອີກຕໍ່ໄປ ເນື່ອງຈາກກຳນົດເວລາຂອງມັນໄດ້ໝົດອາຍຸແລ້ວ.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Latvian translation uses 'apturēts' (stopped/halted/arrested) instead of 'beidzies' (expired/ended). This changes the meaning from the link's time having run out to the time being actively stopped or suspended.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Piekļuve cauri šo saiti vairs nav pieejama, jo tās darbības laiks ir beidzies.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'link' is incorrectly transliterated/misspelled as 'лиенку' using Cyrillic characters, which is not Albanian.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Qasja përmes këtij linku nuk është më e disponueshme pasi ka skaduar kohëzgjatja e tij.
